title: Windows PIDS
description: Windows Screens PIDS Resource Pack for Joban Client Mod By SQ_PRO
body:
A custom Minecraft resource pack for the Joban client mod, PIDS. It features iconic Windows screens like the BSOD, bringing a tech-inspired aesthetic to Minecraft.

**NOTE:** In order to insert the images to a PIDS, right click it with a brush and then type in the ID of the desired image to apply it on a PIDS

PIDS PRESET CODE:
![PIDS PRESET CODE](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1976ba5abe206f0a8be87b3579182d3316df639c_0.webp)
